'''Pell Nakay''' was a [[Balawai]] child who lived in [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She was [[Keela Nakay|Keela's]] sister. While fleeing a battle during the [[Summertime War]], she, Keela, [[Terrel Nakay]], [[Urno]], and [[Nykl]] had an accident when their [[steamcrawler]] became stuck in a lava flow, but [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] managed to save them. Pell's mother, along with a group of Balawai, were searching for them, but when they finally found the children and Master Windu, [[Kar Vastor]] and his [[Akk Guard]]s and [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] attacked them. Pell escaped unhurt but her mother was killed. She and the other children also witnessed the brutal murder of Terrel at the hands of Vastor. Pell, along with other Balawai prisoners, were delivered by Windu to a steamcrawler path where the prisoners were spotted and rescued by a Balawai gunship. Looking upon the children one final time, Mace only hoped that Pell and the others would one day be able to look at a Jedi without hatred in their hearts.
